# GPUFlow Blog

> GPU rental guides, pricing comparisons, benchmarks, and tutorials for ML engineers and AI developers. Learn how to rent GPUs up to 60% cheaper than AWS using decentralized infrastructure and crypto payments.

## About GPUFlow

GPUFlow is a decentralized GPU rental marketplace connecting GPU owners with AI/ML developers, miners, and researchers. Payments via stablecoin (USDC/USDT) on Polygon. No KYC required. Smart contract escrow protects all payments.

- Platform: https://gpuflow.app
- Documentation: https://docs.gpuflow.app
- Blog: https://blog.gpuflow.app/en/

## Posts

### Benchmarks
- Ollama vs vLLM vs TGI: RTX 4090 Inference Benchmark (Measured, Not Marketed): https://blog.gpuflow.app/en/ollama-vs-vllm-vs-tgi-rtx-4090-benchmark/
  Controlled RTX 4090 benchmark comparing Ollama, vLLM, and Hugging Face TGI for Llama-3.1-8B. Real throughput, latency, VRAM usage, and cost-per-token data.

### Comparisons
- RunPod vs Vast.ai: Complete Comparison for AI Developers in 2026: https://blog.gpuflow.app/en/runpod-vs-vastapi-comparison/
  Pricing, reliability, features, and recommendations for ML training and inference workloads.
- GPU Rental Pricing Comparison 2026: https://blog.gpuflow.app/en/gpu-rental-pricing-comparison-2026/
  Full price comparison across AWS, GCP, Azure, Lambda Labs, and decentralized providers.

### Tutorials
- The Ultimate Guide to Private LLM Fine-Tuning on Decentralized GPUs: https://blog.gpuflow.app/en/private-llm-fine-tuning-guide/
  Fine-tune open-weights LLMs with complete privacy. QLoRA training, secure data transfer, environment sanitization.
- How to Train Stable Diffusion LoRA Models for Under $10: https://blog.gpuflow.app/en/stable-diffusion-lora-training-under-10-dollars/
  Step-by-step LoRA training using rented GPUs. Dataset prep, configuration, cost optimization.
- Setting Up MetaMask and Polygon for Your First GPU Rental: https://blog.gpuflow.app/en/setting-up-metamask-polygon-gpu-rental/
  Beginner walkthrough: MetaMask install, Polygon network setup, wallet funding. Zero crypto experience required.

### Guides
- How to Secure Your Dataset on a Public GPU Node: https://blog.gpuflow.app/en/how-to-secure-dataset-on-public-gpu-node/
  Encryption, virtualization boundaries, compliance, and secure sanitization for AI training on rented infrastructure.
- How to Rent GPUs Without KYC or Identity Verification: https://blog.gpuflow.app/en/how-to-rent-gpu-without-kyc/
  No-KYC platform comparison, tradeoffs, and how to start renting in under 5 minutes.
- Complete Guide to Renting GPUs with Cryptocurrency: https://blog.gpuflow.app/en/rent-gpu-with-crypto/
  Bitcoin, Ethereum, and stablecoin GPU payments. Privacy-focused options and smart contract escrow explained.
- Why Stablecoins Are the Smartest Way to Pay for GPU Rental: https://blog.gpuflow.app/en/stable-coins-are-the-smartest-way-to-pay-for-gpu-rental/
  Why USDC and USDT beat ETH and BTC for compute payments. Volatility elimination, low fees, fast settlement.
- How Smart Contract Escrow Protects Your GPU Rental Payment: https://blog.gpuflow.app/en/smart-contract-escrow/
  How on-chain escrow makes payment theft technically impossible. Verify your escrowed funds yourself.
- Hidden Fees in GPU Rental: How Crypto Saves International Users Money: https://blog.gpuflow.app/en/hidden-fees-in-gpu-rental/
  Real cost calculations for GPU rental from Brazil, India, Nigeria, Japan. Credit card and FX fees add 5-15%.

### Case Studies
- Why Corporate AI Policies are Banning ChatGPT (And What to Use Instead): https://blog.gpuflow.app/en/why-corporate-policies-banning-chatgpt/
  Data privacy risks, regulatory compliance failures, and IP concerns driving enterprise ChatGPT bans. Open-weights alternatives on private infrastructure.

## Key Topics Covered

- GPU rental pricing and cost comparison (AWS vs decentralized)
- LLM inference benchmarks (Ollama, vLLM, TGI, RTX 4090)
- Private AI training and data security on rented GPUs
- Crypto payments for GPU rental (USDC, USDT, Polygon)
- No-KYC GPU rental options
- Fine-tuning (QLoRA, LoRA, Stable Diffusion)
- Smart contract escrow for trustless payments
- Enterprise AI compliance and ChatGPT alternatives
